title: Gift Membership
description: Select the category of your choice and provide a gift to a deserving individual.
text:
Give the gift of Membership to build the Naval Institute’s community by sharing new voices, experience, and knowledge in the open forum. Simply select “Is this Membership a gift for another person?” option on the Membership category of your choice prior to adding the item to you cart.
Complete the information for the gift recipient when you check out so that he/she will receive notice of your gift, along with instructions on how to take advantage of their Membership.
